name: Bean Vegetable Medley
recipeIngredient: 1 Med. green pepper, cut into strips
2 cup Red kidney beans, drained (15-20 oz)
1 package Frozen baby lima beans, 10 oz
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion, celery, and green pepper; cook slowly for about 10 minutes until vegetables are softened but not browned.
3. Stir in tomatoes, kidney beans, barley, parsley, salt, basil, and black pepper. Mix well to combine.
4. Pour the mixture into a buttered casserole dish with a lid. Add boiling water, covering the dish completely.
5. Bake for 1-1/2 hours at 350 degrees F or until the barley is tender and liquid is absorbed. Sprinkle grated cheese over the top before serving.
6. Serve hot with marinated, slightly blanched mixed vegetables, and warm French bread.
